{{Quote|I have three Fixers who need extraction from Nevoota. Listening posts are done, but…|Fixer Two|<ref name="Star Wars: The Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Nevoota''' was a planet<ref name="TEGtW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref> of the [[Balmorra system/Legends|Balmorra system]],<ref name="Codex" /> in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]].<ref name="TEGtW" /> It was the homeworld of the [[Nevoota/Legends|Nevoota]], a species of sentient<ref name="Codex" /> bees<ref name="SkyeWalkers">''[[SkyeWalkers: A Clone Wars Story]]''</ref> [[Nevoota Extinction|wiped out]] by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] in [[4024 BBY]].<ref name="TEGtW" />

{{Planet-stub}}
